## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members by providing an overview of GrowthX.ai's customer use cases and business context.](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai helps venture-backed companies diversify from paid channels to organic growth, addressing pain points like high costs and slow execution](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Editorial content (e.g. blogs) is the primary focus, with programmatic content as a secondary offering for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Recent pivot to 8-week "strategy sprints" has improved customer retention and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows enable faster, more cost-effective content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### Customer Context and Pain Points

  - [Many customers are venture-backed companies under pressure to grow quickly](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Often over-reliant on paid channels (e.g. paid search), seeking to diversify to organic](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Building organic engines is time-consuming, costly, and challenging to coordinate](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Average CMO tenure of 14 months creates urgency to show results](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Value Proposition

  - [Accelerates organic growth through AI-powered content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Significantly reduces costs and time to market compared to traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Provides end-to-end support: strategy, execution, measurement, and iteration](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Helps brands move faster and show results within tight timeframes](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Content Types and Approach

  - [Editorial content: Longer-form articles/blogs, requiring deeper editorial process](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Programmatic content: Template-based, scalable content targeting multiple variants](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Focus on understanding customer ICP, motivations, and creating valuable answers](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Rigorous process for strategy, calibration, and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Business Evolution and Retention

  - [Shifted from short 3-month contracts to 12-month agreements with 90-day pilots](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Recently introduced 8-week "strategy sprints" to improve alignment and retention](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Retention has improved significantly since implementing strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Only one opt-out from new model; generally positive outlook on renewals](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Programmatic Content Example

  - [Created per diem rate pages for Ramp, targeting high-volume search terms](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Leveraged AI to scale content creation across multiple state/city variants](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Balanced templated approach with unique, valuable content for users](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New team members to continue onboarding and familiarizing with GrowthX.ai processes](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [Kyle available for follow-up questions or deeper dives into specific areas](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [Team to focus on upcoming customer renewals to maintain positive retention trend](https://fathom.video/share/jsDqa2_GhrUx6SsYxoTfXmgZjTcxNxGD?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
